description:
Parent epic: V3 E9: Memory and compaction

Source task 5/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for memory capture/retrieve, namespace validation, compaction skip,
  compaction summarize, retained tail, boundary safety, failure-open behavior,
  and custom prompt behavior.

Epic closure criteria:
- memory and compaction have separate, crisp docs and tests
- compaction does not mutate the canonical transcript

comments.text: Added focused coverage for imported memory namespace validation and runtime compaction dynamic prompt behavior. The memory tests caught and fixed a real nil-key validation bug caused by nil being an atom in Elixir; context namespace keys now reject nil and blank strings. The compaction regression proves module prompt callbacks are used during runtime compaction and that compaction does not mutate the canonical Jido.Thread. Verified with focused memory/compaction/DSL tests plus mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, mix doctor --raise, and git diff --check.

title: E9: Add tests for memory capture/retrieve, namespace validation, compaction skip, c...
